evals.prompt: Connect to our OMERO server and list all my projects and the datasets under each one.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-omero. Connects with BlitzGateway(username, password, host, port) (ideally as a context manager), calls conn.connect(), navigates the Project -> Dataset hierarchy with listProjects / listChildren, and closes the connection.

assertions.value: Uses BlitzGateway to connect and walks the Project/Dataset hierarchy, closing the connection.

evals.prompt: I need to pull the raw pixel data for image 12345 from OMERO as a NumPy array so I can compute intensity statistics in Python.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-omero. Retrieves the image by ID via BlitzGateway, accesses raw pixel data as a NumPy array (image processing capability), and computes the requested statistics.

assertions.value: Retrieves the image by ID and returns pixel data as a NumPy array for analysis.

evals.prompt: For a batch of OMERO images that already have ROIs, extract the pixel intensities within each ROI and store the measurements in an OMERO table.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-omero. Retrieves images with their existing ROI shapes (ROIs capability), extracts intensity statistics per ROI region, and stores the measurements in an OMERO table linked to the images/dataset.

evals.prompt: Access the screening data on our OMERO server for a high-content screen and iterate the wells of a plate to retrieve their images.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-omero. Navigates the screening hierarchy (Screen -> Plate -> Well -> WellSample -> Image) via BlitzGateway to iterate wells and retrieve their images for high-content screening analysis.

evals.prompt: Write an Opentrons protocol that uses the absorbance plate reader to read a 96-well plate at 450 and 650 nm.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-opentrons. The task is liquid-handling/plate-reading automation on an Opentrons robot, not managing or analyzing microscopy image data on an OMERO server.
